titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 170: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 170. (A.R. No. 245 of 1925.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa, Vaṭamūlēśvara temple.

Records a gift of five sheep for the supply of 5 nāḻi of ghee for the sacred bath of the god on the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti every year in the temple of Tiruvālanduṟai Mahādēva at Śiṟu-Paḻuvūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṉṟa-kūṟṟam by Kausiyaṉ Māraṉ of Maṅgalam in Maṅgala-nāḍu, who is stated to have constructed the temple at the behest of Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Maṟavaṉ Kaṇḍaṉ. He also granted one mā and kāṇi of land for those who were to supply one nāḻi of tumbai flowers daily to the god.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 384.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecariva
rmmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu kuṉ
ṟakkuṟṟattu brahmadeyam
ciṟupaḻuvūr tiruvālantuṟai
mahādevarkku Uttaramayanam
paṟṟiṉa Ayaṉasaṅkirāntikku
Āṭi Aruḷa maṅkalanāṭṭu maṅkala
ttu maṅkalamuṭaiya kauci
yaṉ māṟaṉṉeṉ Āṭiaruḷa vai
tta ṉey nārāyattāl Aiñ
ñāḻiyāl Āṭu Añcu śrī
koyileṭuppicca paḻa
veṭṭaraiyar maṟavan
kaṇṭa(ṉ)ṉār Aru(ḷ)ḷā(lā)l
leṭuppitta māṟapirāṉ va
ttitu Ivane tiruvālan
tuṟai nallūrkkuḷattil I
raṇṭerippaṭikku naṭuveṉ
ṟey mākāṇi nilamum (nica)
niccanāḻi tumpaipū Aṭṭa
tevarnāḻiyāl Aṭṭuvārkku
vaittitu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
